# Security Policy

## Supported versions

Security fixes are applied to the latest published `@neo-skeuo/*` versions on npm.

## Reporting a vulnerability

Please **do not** open a public GitHub issue for security vulnerabilities.

1. Open a [private security advisory](https://github.com/haithanh079/neo-skeuo/security/advisories/new) on this repository, or
2. Use [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/haithanh079/neo-skeuo/issues) with the title prefixed `[SECURITY]` and minimal reproduction details if private advisories are unavailable.

We aim to acknowledge reports within a few business days and will coordinate disclosure and a fix release when appropriate.
